constitution.purpose: Deliver an accounting and operations platform with enforceable accounting integrity, traceable workflows, and production-grade UI/API behavior.
non_negotiable_rules: Do not weaken runtime accounting enforcement.
Do not change invoice posting formulas unless explicitly required by accounting law.
Do not change inventory posting formulas unless explicitly required by accounting law.
Every task must produce verifiable evidence.

module_architecture.name: Accounting Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Translate business events into balanced journal entries using configured accounts and posting rules.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Primary source of journal, ledger, trial balance, and equity movement.
validation_rules: Posting date must be in an open period if enforced
traceability_rules: Every entry must keep source type, source id, and linked document context

module_architecture.name: Invoice Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Create, validate, and finalize sales documents and link them to accounting and downstream payment flows.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Creates receivable, revenue, and output VAT postings on finalize.
traceability_rules: Invoice number must map to journal lines and ledger queries

module_architecture.name: Inventory Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Persist inventory movements and post inventory and cost journals where applicable.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Moves inventory asset and cost of goods sold balances.
traceability_rules: Inventory transactions must retain reference, journal entry number, and source linkage

module_architecture.name: Payment Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Record payments, allocate against one or more invoices, and update settlement state.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Posts cash/bank movement, AR/AP settlement, and advances when amounts remain unallocated.
validation_rules: Allocation sum cannot exceed payment amount
target documents must belong to same counterparty type
amounts must be positive and internally consistent
traceability_rules: Each AR/AP settlement line must keep invoice/document linkage

module_architecture.name: Customer Advance Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Create customer credit from excess receipts and later apply or refund it without breaking traceability.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Uses liability account 2300 for customer advances and relieves AR when applied.
validation_rules: Available advance must cover requested application
traceability_rules: Applications must link original customer, target invoice, and posting source

module_architecture.name: VAT Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Calculate VAT at line and document level and expose compliant output/input VAT totals.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Drives VAT payable and receivable postings via tax-aware journal generation.
validation_rules: Buyer VAT and address requirements on tax invoices
rate math must reconcile with line totals
traceability_rules: VAT codes and document context must persist to VAT detail output

module_architecture.name: Reporting Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Aggregate posted accounting data into operational and financial reports.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Read-only aggregation layer over posted entries.
validation_rules: Report totals must reconcile to ledger source data
income and revenue classifications must be handled correctly
traceability_rules: Document filters must return relevant journal and ledger evidence

module_architecture.name: Traceability Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Preserve cross-reference data so every accounting movement can be traced back to a business event.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Enables safe auditability rather than new monetary balances.
validation_rules: linked document numbers must be queryable
traceability_rules: Every cross-module post stores source_type, source_id, and document context

module_architecture.name: Integrity Enforcement Engine
module_architecture.processing_logic: Run synchronous post-write accounting validations and reject broken state.
traceability_rules: Must verify invoice-level linkage for allocated payment lines
report_impact: ensures reports only reflect valid posted data

module_architecture.name: UI Validation Layer
module_architecture.processing_logic: Validate that business constraints and successful actions are correctly represented in the interface.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Indirect; guards correct data entry before accounting posts occur.
validation_rules: successful issue flow must surface next actions
traceability_rules: UI-issued documents must match backend document numbers and later report results

module_architecture.name: API Layer
module_architecture.processing_logic: Expose business workflows and reports through company-scoped endpoints.
module_architecture.accounting_impact: Gateway to all posting and reporting operations.
traceability_rules: Endpoints must return sufficient identifiers for follow-up report proof
report_impact: report endpoints and business action endpoints used for proof

module_architecture.name: Testing Layer
module_architecture.processing_logic: Run smoke, workflow, validation, edge-case, and regression checks against backend and UI surfaces.
validation_rules: No task is complete without passing relevant checks
traceability_rules: Tests must reference concrete artifacts, outputs, or report payloads
